# Shopify Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official Shopify agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It provides the elite standards for building and scaling high-performance e-commerce platforms.

### Commerce Intelligence
- **shopify-ai-toolkit**: Official protocols for leveraging Shopify's AI capabilities within custom themes and app architectures.
